Welcome to Tuniki Santhoshini's Portfolio

I am a Computer Science student specializing in Data Science with a passion for building intelligent and scalable web applications. My interests lie in AI, web development, and real-world problem solving.

I have hands-on experience in Python, React, SQL, and machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and Scikit-learn. I have developed projects including phishing detection systems and AI-based image captioning models.

My goal is to continuously learn, innovate, and contribute to impactful technology solutions while growing as a full stack developer.

Projects

Phishing URL Detection System

Developed a real-time ML-based web app using Flask to detect phishing URLs.

Image Captioning Model

Built a CNN-RNN based AI system to generate captions for images.

Restaurant Database System

Designed a MySQL database with optimized queries and backend integration.
